name: ucoz
description: Generate uCoz landing pages, provision new or existing sites, translate and localize site content, and manage templates, menus, FTP files, and mail forms. Includes landing, provisioning, and translator skills plus ucoz-mcp server.

interface.shortDescription: Build uCoz landing pages and manage your site from Codex
interface.longDescription: Generate uCoz landing pages, provision new or existing sites, and translate or localize site content with AI. Includes the Landing skill for hero sections, lead forms, SEO, and menus; the Provisioning skill for site setup, uAPI, FTP, and MCP config; the Site Translator skill for in-place translation and cross-site migration; plus ucoz-mcp for templates, FTP uploads, mail forms, and site modules.
defaultPrompt: Build a landing page for my uCoz site with a hero section and lead form
Create a new uCoz site and connect MCP with uAPI and FTP
Provision my existing uCoz site for MCP integration
Update my uCoz homepage as a promo landing page with SEO and mobile menu
Translate the latest news posts into English and keep the URLs unchanged
